interfaces.name: DropdownOption

components.name: App
Card
components.template:
{{ title() }}

{{ description() }}

components.name: CategoryPage
components.template:
<app-header></app-header>

<section class="category-page">
  <form [formGroup]="form" class="category-page__form">
    <app-text-input
      formControlName="search"
      placeholder="Rechercher une catégorie"
      iconName="search"
      class="category-page__form__search"
    ></app-text-input>
    <app-dropdown
      formControlName="dropdown"
      [placeholder]="'Tous les groupes de catégories'"
      [options]="exampleOptions"
      class="category-page__form__dropdown"
    ></app-dropdown>
  </form>
</section>

propertiesClass.name: exampleOptions
propertiesClass.defaultValue:
[
    { value: 'option1', label: 'Option 1' },
    { value: 'option2', label: 'Option 2' },
    { value: 'option3', label: 'Option 3' },
  ]

propertiesClass.name: form

components.name: DropdownComponent
components.template:
{{ selectedOption()?.label || placeholder() }}
@if (isOpen()) {
    @for (option of options(); track option.value) {
  • {{ option.label }}
    • }
}

components.name: Header
components.template:
Catégories

  • Groupe de catégorie
  • Ordre alphabétique

components.name: IconComponent
Pill
Tab
TextInput
components.template:
<label class="input-text__wrapper" [for]="id">
  @if (iconName(); as icon) {
    <app-icon [name]="icon" class="input-text__icon" aria-hidden="true"></app-icon>
  }
  <input
    type="text"
    [id]="id"
    class="input-text__control paragraph-tiny"
    [placeholder]="placeholder()"
    [value]="value"
    (input)="onInput($event)"
    [disabled]="disabled"
  />
</label>

variables.name: appConfig
routes
variables.defaultValue:
[
  { path: '', redirectTo: 'category/grouped', pathMatch: 'full' },
  { path: 'category', redirectTo: 'category/grouped', pathMatch: 'full' },
  { path: 'category/:sortType', component: CategoryPage },
]

src/app/app.config.ts.name: appConfig

src/app/app.routes.ts.name: routes
src/app/app.routes.ts.defaultValue:
[
  { path: '', redirectTo: 'category/grouped', pathMatch: 'full' },
  { path: 'category', redirectTo: 'category/grouped', pathMatch: 'full' },
  { path: 'category/:sortType', component: CategoryPage },
]
